steps.goal: From the home feed, long-press the profile picture icon in the bottom-right corner of the navigation bar to open the account switcher popup. In the account switcher, tap the 'Add Instagram account' button. After tapping it, wait a few seconds for the next screen to load — do NOT scroll or use find_and_tap, just wait. Then: if you see a screen with 'Log into existing account' and 'Create new account', tap 'Log into existing account'. If you see a screen listing existing accounts with a 'Use another profile' button, tap 'Use another profile'. If you land directly on a login screen with username/password fields, you are done. After each tap, wait for the screen to transition before taking the next action.

on_login_screen.description: The Instagram login screen is visible with username and password input fields and a Log in button

accounts_count.description: The number of Instagram accounts currently signed in, as seen in the account switcher or account picker screen

steps.goal: If a Google Password Manager popup appears, tap 'Cancel' to dismiss it. Clear any pre-filled username in the username field, then enter '{{username}}' and enter password '{{password}}', then tap 'Log in'.

on_2fa_screen.description: A security code / 2FA input screen appeared after login

steps.goal: Use get_totp with text '{{totpSecret}}' to generate a 6-digit code. Tap the security code input field to focus it, then use paste to paste the code. Tap Continue or Next or Confirm. If you see 'Waiting for approval' or 'Choose a way to confirm', tap 'Try another way', then select 'Authentication app', then tap Continue to get to the code entry screen, then do the get_totp + paste.

past_2fa.description: The 2FA screen is no longer visible — moved on to onboarding, home feed, or any other screen

steps.goal: Dismiss any onboarding screens (Save Login Info, Notifications, 'Turn on Notifications', etc.) by tapping 'Not Now' or 'Skip' or 'Next'. Keep dismissing until you reach the home feed.

on_home_feed.description: The Instagram home feed is visible with posts/stories and bottom navigation bar

steps.goal: Verify the home feed is visible with the bottom navigation bar.

on_home_feed.description: The Instagram home feed is visible with bottom navigation
